Operation 'getSubaccountActivePlan' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about what plan details are returned, what the sub-account ID parameter represents, and what constitutes an 'active plan'. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and parameter requirements for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve the active plan for a sub-account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the currently active subscription plan for a specified sub-account, including plan details such as features, limits, and billing information. Requires the sub-account ID as a path parameter. Returns the active plan object with all associated plan details.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about what plan details are returned, what the sub-account ID parameter represents, and what constitutes an 'active plan'. Enhanced description clarifies the return value and parameter requirements for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSubaccountLogo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description doesn't clarify what is returned (file format, URL, binary data), whether a logo must exist, or what happens if none is set. Enhanced description specifies return format and handles the case where no logo exists, improving AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve the custom logo for the sub-accounts branding.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the custom logo image that has been uploaded for sub-account branding purposes. Returns the logo file in its original format. If no custom logo has been uploaded, returns an appropriate response indicating no logo is available.
data.reasoning: Current description doesn't clarify what is returned (file format, URL, binary data), whether a logo must exist, or what happens if none is set. Enhanced description specifies return format and handles the case where no logo exists, improving AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'uploadSubaccountLogo' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about accepted file formats, what happens to existing logos, what is returned, and the side effect of the logo being applied to branding. Enhanced description provides input constraints, side effects, and return information for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Upload a custom logo for sub-accounts branding.
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a custom logo image file for sub-account branding. Accepts image files in common formats (PNG, JPG, GIF). Replaces any previously uploaded logo. Returns confirmation of successful upload with logo details. The uploaded logo will be used across all sub-account branding elements.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about accepted file formats, what happens to existing logos, what is returned, and the side effect of the logo being applied to branding. Enhanced description provides input constraints, side effects, and return information for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'deleteSubaccountLogo' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description doesn't explain the side effect (reversion to default branding) or what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies the consequence of deletion and return value, helping AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

data.current_description: Remove the custom logo for sub-accounts branding.
data.description_suggestion: Removes the custom logo previously uploaded for sub-account branding. After deletion, sub-accounts will revert to default branding without a custom logo. Returns a success confirmation message. This action cannot be undone without re-uploading a logo.
data.reasoning: Current description doesn't explain the side effect (reversion to default branding) or what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies the consequence of deletion and return value, helping AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

message: Operation 'getAgencyDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description is too generic and doesn't specify what 'details' are included or the context for when this operation should be used. Enhanced description clarifies the types of information returned and the typical use case, improving AI agent decision-making about when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve agency account details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about the agency account, including account status, contact information, billing details, and sub-account management settings. Returns the complete agency account profile. This endpoint is typically used by agency administrators to view their account configuration.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic and doesn't specify what 'details' are included or the context for when this operation should be used. Enhanced description clarifies the types of information returned and the typical use case, improving AI agent decision-making about when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteEmailValidationList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description is too brief and lacks important context. Added information about permanence, what gets deleted (list and results), authentication requirement, return value, and irreversibility to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Delete a specific email validation list.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a specific email validation list identified by its ID. This operation removes the list and all associated email validation results. Requires authentication. Returns a success confirmation message. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks important context. Added information about permanence, what gets deleted (list and results), authentication requirement, return value, and irreversibility to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'validateEmailList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what validation entails and how results are accessed. Enhanced with information about validation criteria, authentication, return value, and asynchronous nature to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's workflow.

data.current_description: Start validation of a previously uploaded email list.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates validation processing for a previously uploaded email list. The validation process checks each email address in the list for deliverability, syntax, and other quality metrics. Requires authentication. Returns a confirmation that validation has started. Validation results will be available asynchronously and can be retrieved via the validation results endpoint.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what validation entails and how results are accessed. Enhanced with information about validation criteria, authentication, return value, and asynchronous nature to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's workflow.

message: Operation 'listEmailsInValidationList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Added details about pagination, validation status information included in response, and use case context. This helps AI agents understand what data is returned and how to handle potentially large result sets.

data.current_description: Retrieve all emails in a specific validation list.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all email addresses contained in a specific validation list identified by its ID. Requires authentication. Returns a paginated list of emails with their validation status and results. Useful for reviewing which addresses were included in a validation batch.
data.reasoning: Added details about pagination, validation status information included in response, and use case context. This helps AI agents understand what data is returned and how to handle potentially large result sets.

message: Operation 'getEmailValidationResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details.
